hero.tagline: Full-stack web developer, AI integrator, and smart-contract engineer

myStory.heading: My Story
myStory.p1: I've been around computers since I was a kid — first playing games, then repairing them, then building on them. Over the last decade I've turned that into a career spanning full-stack web apps, AI integrations, and Web3.
myStory.p2: Today I help SMEs across the EU turn ideas into production-ready web apps — smarter products with AI where it matters, robust infrastructure, and clean UX. React, Node.js, .NET, GraphQL, smart contracts, dApps.

work.heading: My Work
work.intro: A selection of projects I've delivered — from web apps and e-commerce to enterprise intranet tools and Web3 dApps.

hero.heading: So in a nutshell, who is Frank Poboček?
hero.p1: Full-stack web developer, AI integrator, smart-contract engineer, consultant, and founder — wearing multiple hats by design.
hero.p2: Let me share my journey with you.

young.heading: Young Lad
young.p1: Since I was a kid, I've always been around computers — playing games, repairing them, or occasionally smashing them when the opponent team killed me in Counter-Strike.
young.p2: One memory sums up my childhood. I had a PC on the kitchen table (we were redecorating), plugged in and running CS 1.6, while my dad assembled an IKEA wardrobe and my phone rang.
young.p3: The lads invited me out to play football. I politely declined. Seconds later I threw a grenade in-game, my speakers bellowed "FIRE IN THE HOLE", and I hung up as fast as I could. I tried football, cycling, gym, airsoft — but the PC stayed #1.

school.heading: Secondary school
school.p1: I studied at the Secondary School of Electrical Engineering, K. Adlera, in Bratislava-Dubravka. That's where my programming journey started, while I competed in regional CS 1.6 tournaments.
school.p2: I picked Computer Systems. The theoretical foundations (algebra, algorithms, C++, building things) combined with hands-on work became a great head-start for my career.
school.intro: Some of what I accomplished there:
school.b2: Final exam: recorded Cinema 4D tutorials and built a PHP site to host them.

university.heading: University
university.p1: I chose the Faculty of Economic Informatics at the University of Economics in Bratislava. Statistics, maths, and coding in one degree — a dream scenario.
university.p2: In C programming classes I was ahead of my peers thanks to my secondary school. Professor Ľubomír Turňa, RNDr., CSc. noticed and invited me to co-author a paper at the International Scientific Conference for eLearning. The nerves before the conference were real — but we made it.

achievements.heading: Achievements & Work
achievements.b1: Co-author and presenter of a publication at the International Scientific Conference for eLearning — numerical verification of model results accounting for gradation, feedback, repetition, and forgetting. Built the .NET data-model analysis app (2015).
achievements.b2: Master's thesis: Application of fuzzy logic in financial decision-making. Built a credit fuzzy application in C# / .NET WPF (2017).
achievements.b3: Bachelor's thesis: Amortization schedule calculator in C# / .NET WPF, comparing debt repayment types (2015).
achievements.b4: Internships at two local studios building .NET WPF apps with Microsoft SQL.

post.heading: Post Academics
post.body: Two days after graduating I started as a Backend Engineer in .NET at CRIF — building credit-register systems for international markets.

blockchain.heading: Blockchain
blockchain.body: Smart contracts, Solidity, dApp integrations, Web3 audits. This chapter is still being written.

today.heading: Today
today.p1: Today I run pobocek.dev — helping businesses across the EU turn ideas into production-ready web apps and Web3 solutions, from MVPs to full-scale platforms.
today.p2: I build custom web applications, intranets, and e-commerce platforms for SME clients across the full stack — React, Node.js, .NET, and Apollo GraphQL. I also ship my own SaaS: Eviro — automating review collection so happy customers become 5-star ratings on autopilot.
today.p3: A decade of production experience across fintech, real estate, and B2B means fewer surprises, faster delivery, and code that still makes sense in year three.
today.stackItems: React · Next.js · Astro · Node.js · TypeScript · .NET · PostgreSQL · Apollo GraphQL · Tailwind · Solidity

ai.heading: AI where it moves the needle
ai.intro: Most businesses don't need a chatbot — they need AI wired into the workflow where it quietly saves hours every week.
ai.b1Body: Reply drafts, review responses, intake forms that pre-qualify leads — all tuned to your tone of voice.
ai.b2Body: Search your own docs, contracts, and tickets with natural-language queries. Cited answers, not hallucinations.
ai.b3Body: Automate the multi-step stuff — scheduling, approvals, report generation — with graceful fallbacks when the AI is unsure.
ai.b4Body: I'll tell you straight when an off-the-shelf tool beats a custom build, and where building pays back.

seo.defaultDescription: Smarter web apps, AI integration, and Web3 — built by Frank Poboček across React, Node.js, .NET, GraphQL, and smart contracts.
